news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Fund

overview.description: The First Trust California Municipal High Income ETF (FCAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that targets fixed income securities of various maturities and credit ratings, with interest income that is exempted from federal and California state income tax. FCAL was launched on Jun 20, 2017 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Fund
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. ("FTA") announces the declaration of the monthly distributions for certain exchange-traded funds advised by FTA. The following dates apply to ...
